center.name: 阿伯德爾山脈
center.summary: 阿伯德爾山脈是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联3种鸟类，包括Olive ibis、非洲草鸮、Kikuyu white-eye，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in central Kenya, in the Aberdare Mountains and on Mount Kenya

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: akleyorum occurs in the montane forests of eastern Africa at altitudes of 1,800-12,000 m above sea level. It is found in the eastern DRCongo, on Mount Kenya and in the Aberdares of Kenya, Kilimanjaro in Tanzania, on Mount Meru and on Mount Elgon; but is apparently absent from lowland forests in east Africa such as the Kakamega tropical rainforest in Kenya.Brooks T

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: In east Africa it may also be found in dry grassland and at higher altitudes in Aberdares and on Mount Kenya. In southern Africa this species generally prefers marshes and vleis where there are patches of tall, rank grass and other vegetation but it may also be found in fynbos, renosterveld and acacia scrub close to water. The specific habitat requirements of the African grass owl characterize it as a habitat specialist.{{Cite journal|last1=Ansara-Ross|first1=T
